problems.diagnostic: named thing must be an expression with a type
problems.cause: AGREE guarantees reference port names that are not visible in the component type scope
problems.minimal_edit: Move the AGREE annex block from GYRO to GYRO.IMPL and replace port references with subcomponent port references

executor_steps: Remove the AGREE annex block from the GYRO component type
Add a new AGREE annex block to the GYRO.IMPL component implementation
In the new AGREE annex block, reference the ports through the subcomponent gyro_sub
Change gyro_out_data_x = gyro_in_data_x to gyro_sub.gyro_out_data_x = gyro_in_data_x
Change gyro_out_data_y = gyro_in_data_y to gyro_sub.gyro_out_data_y = gyro_in_data_y
Change gyro_out_data_z = gyro_in_data_z to gyro_sub.gyro_out_data_z = gyro_in_data_z
